reviews.review_msg: Hemant Sashittal. This teacher made inappropriate and sexually suggestive comments toward my sister, which made her feel deeply uncomfortable and unsafe. Behavior like this is unacceptable from any educator. I hope the school addresses this seriously. And he loves trump.
Not an educator, just educated. He believes he is never wrong, and the student always is. Does not make me feel welcome at this school. Very upsetting to see him remained unchecked.
pedantic, arrogant, and ethnocentric.  delusional ego for a man with no field experience.

Eloquent speaker that really gets you thinking. Super respectful prof who encourages questions and gives plenty of feedback to any comments/concerns raised in class. Summarizes key concepts well in each lecture. Exams are fair. Questions are based off of the lecture readings.

Sit down and buckle up! This is a crash course on JavaScript, CSS, HTML, PHP, and MySQL geared towards business students with no formal training. Amin did a great job of squeezing this rigorous curriculum altogether into a fast-paced learning environment. If you like a challenge and you're great at problem solving, this is the prof for you.

Fabulous Prof! The most interesting and useful prof I've ever met. Teaches you the real world stuff, not those old theory concepts that dun even apply in today's world! A big lost for SFU for cutting budget on this Creativity in Bus course.  This course is what you need to improve the world and the world of Bus! Valuable course, strongly recommend!
